title: Aures - Dragon Survival
description: Global modification for Java Minecraft centered around playable dragons.
body:
Curseforge - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragons-survival ![Dragon player In nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9v90aG1X/images/212d97e2d429bedf511b5d901e7cc1bafc6778e5.png)

■ If you dream of becoming a dragon in Minecraft like me, then this mod is for you! ■ 

■ Dragon Survival is a global modification for Minecraft centered around playable dragons. It doesn’t add new mounts to Minecraft - you become the dragon yourself! If you want, of course. Other players can remain human if they wish. In our mod, you don’t just change the player model - you get something much more!

■ Dragon Survival is not as simple as it seems! This global mod completely transforms your gameplay and focuses it on becoming one of 3 types of dragons: forest, sea, or cave. Each type has its own characteristics and unique magic. The mod was created by a true dragon enthusiast for other dragon lovers. A lot of soul has been poured into this mod, with numerous small details that make your gaming experience unique and unforgettable. Beware! Once you try this mod, you’ll most likely never want to play Minecraft without it again! :)

■ 3+ Dragon Species ■ 36 Magic Skills ■ Roleplay Emotions ■ Reputation and Dragon Hunters ■ Flight ■ Growth system ■ Treasures and Loot ■ Customisation and Skins ■ Your own custom species ■ Many Configs ■ Many addons with new species ■ Many modpacks ■

■ Discord and Wiki ■
